prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **H22A VTEC (H22A1 or H22A4)** from the Honda Prelude BB6/BB8, retaining the original **PG6 chassis** for JDM compatibility. Use a **Hasport Performance PG6-H22A swap kit** with custom motor mounts and a **K-Tuned H22A header** to clear the Ascot Innova’s unique firewall clearance issues.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a **Full-Race Motorsports H22A manifold**, paired with a **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** and **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (custom piping to fit the Ascot’s front bumper ducting). Boost target: **18 psi** with a **Hondata S300 standalone ECU** tuned on **E85 fuel** for 350+ WHP.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (custom valving for the PG6’s 5x114.3 bolt pattern) and **Cusco 22mm front / 18mm rear sway bars** to mitigate the Ascot’s notorious body roll. Pair with **Whiteline front upper control arms** and **SPL Parts rear camber arms** for aggressive alignment specs (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear camber).
estetica: Full **Vertex Lang II** widebody kit (modified to fit the Ascot Innova’s unique rear quarter panel contours) with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (30mm risers to clear the Innova’s sloped roofline). Front bumper replaced with a **J’s Racing 1-piece carbon fiber lip** (custom trimmed for the Ascot’s narrower track).

OEM+ JDM styling via **Honda Access Ascot Innova Aero Kit (1992-1996)** in **Satin Black**, paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 16x8 +35 wheels** (5x114.3) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 225/45/16 tires**. Rear fenders rolled with a **Eastside Fab fender roller** to prevent tire rub at full lock.

Interior stripped and fitted with a **Bride Zeta III (Low Max)** driver’s seat on a **NRG Innovations quick-release bolt-in bracket**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, 6-bolt), and **Defi BF Silver gauges** (oil pressure, boost, wideband) mounted in a **Custom Cages A-pillar pod**. Shift knob replaced with a **TWM short-throw shifter** and **Honda Access Innova-specific shift boot (part #71400-SV4-000)** in perforated leather.
